message:
test(base91): expand from 43 to 61 tests for base91 encoding/decoding (wa-1o4sf)

Add 18 new tests covering: DECTAB validity (91 valid entries, high bytes
all INV, control chars all INV), encoded output properties (non-empty
for non-empty input, monotonic length, only uses ENCTAB chars),
edge-case roundtrips (null byte, 0xFF, repeated single byte, UTF-8
text), streaming with power-of-2 chunk sizes for both encoder and
decoder, pipeline encode-then-decode, empty writes preserving internal
state, capacity bound verification for bulk data, 100KB roundtrip, and
CRLF line-wrapped decode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
